title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Boumar Banabash
desc: A royal couple faces divine punishment as the wife endures exile while the prince grapples with a mysterious curse that threatens both love and destiny.

title: Sangharsha
desc: In a village divided by corruption and power struggles between a politician and a doctor, honest newcomer Shubhankar challenges the status quo.

title: Teen Murti
desc: Nabin, Nagen and Naren, three retired men, are the best of friends. Soon, they decide to revive an old tea shop and make some profits.

title: Folk Festival
desc: Artists from across the region showcase their rich and vibrant folk culture through various music and dance performances.
